description: AI Creator Tools for QuantTube in apps/quantube/backend/services/creator-tools/ - thumbnail generation, title A/B testing, clip maker, and caption/transcription services with tests
steps: Create apps/quantube/backend/services/creator-tools/ai-thumbnail.service.ts - Generate thumbnail options from video metadata. Methods: generateThumbnails(videoId, videoUrl, options?), selectBestThumbnail(thumbnails, criteria). Returns array of ThumbnailOption with url, score, description. Uses AI inference (mocked pattern). Zod validation on inputs.

Create apps/quantube/backend/services/creator-tools/ai-title-ab.service.ts - Generate 10 title alternatives and A/B test them. Methods: generateTitles(videoId, description, keywords?), startABTest(videoId, titles), getABTestResults(testId), pickWinner(testId). Tracks impressions/clicks per variant. Zod validation.

Create apps/quantube/backend/services/creator-tools/ai-clip-maker.service.ts - Auto-cut best clips from video. Methods: analyzeVideo(videoId, videoUrl), generateClips(videoId, options: { count, minDuration, maxDuration }), getClipStatus(clipId). Returns Clip objects with startTime, endTime, score, reason. Zod validation.

Create apps/quantube/backend/services/creator-tools/ai-caption.service.ts - Whisper transcription + translation. Methods: transcribe(videoId, videoUrl, language?), translate(transcriptionId, targetLanguage), getCaptions(videoId), exportCaptions(videoId, format: 'srt' | 'vtt' | 'txt'). Returns CaptionSegment array with start, end, text. Zod validation.
Create apps/quantube/backend/services/creator-tools/index.ts - barrel export all creator tool services.
Create apps/quantube/backend/__tests__/creator-tools/ai-thumbnail.service.test.ts - test thumbnail generation returns multiple options with scores, test input validation.
Create apps/quantube/backend/__tests__/creator-tools/ai-title-ab.service.test.ts - test generates 10 titles, A/B test tracking, winner selection based on CTR.
Create apps/quantube/backend/__tests__/creator-tools/ai-clip-maker.service.test.ts - test video analysis returns segments, clip generation respects duration constraints.
Create apps/quantube/backend/__tests__/creator-tools/ai-caption.service.test.ts - test transcription returns segments with timestamps, translation works, export formats are correct.
acceptance_criteria: ai-thumbnail generates array of thumbnail options with scores
ai-title-ab generates exactly 10 titles, A/B test tracks impressions/clicks, picks winner by highest CTR
ai-clip-maker returns clips within specified duration bounds with scores and reasons
ai-caption transcribes to segments with start/end/text, translates to target language, exports in srt/vtt/txt formats
All services use Zod validation and reject invalid inputs
All services have comprehensive test files that pass
verification: Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run and confirm all tests pass including new creator-tools tests
Run npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/quantube/tsconfig.json to confirm type safety (if tsconfig exists, otherwise check from root)
findings: All 54 new tests pass (4 test files). No new TypeScript errors introduced - verified by running tsc on quantube tsconfig. Prettier formatted files via lint-staged. Commit-msg hook requires NODE_OPTIONS='' prefix to work around environment preload issue.
